tasks.title: Fix case-insensitive palindrome checker
tasks.description: The palindrome checker is too strict. Make it ignore case and non-alphanumeric characters so "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama" is recognized as a palindrome.

tasks.title: Fix array chunking off-by-one
tasks.description: The chunk helper produces an extra empty chunk at the end. Remove it.

tasks.title: Make JSON parser return null for invalid input
tasks.description: The parseJson helper currently throws when given invalid JSON. Change it to return null instead.
